subcodes.first_line: Praise beloveth and befitteth that Beloved One who has ever been and Who will remain unto all eternity.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که لم یزل بوده و لایزال خواهد بود رحمتش جمیع من
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @love and unity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @humility; meekness; lowliness
